title: Space Generation Gain — space created for teammates
definition: Fernandez & Bornn (2018) Eqs 10-11. A generation event is detected when a defender that was marking a teammate (within 5 m) is dragged onto the generator within a 3 s window, releasing the teammate; the teammate's gain in owned dangerous space (control x xT) is credited to the generator. Per-match opponent-weighted is the headline.
